Contact Profile: Also reports for WSB-AM.  <From Bulldog> Working out of the U.S. Capitol, Cox mainly covers Congress, but will keep an eye on events happening at the White House and in Washington, DC. "I've been out on the campaign trail as well for much of this year," he says. "For me to get interested, it really needs to be linked to something newsworthy that's happening, like people coming to Capitol Hill to lobby on some issues, not just a news conference about a report or poll that few people are going to read." The last pitch resulting in coverage pertained to insurance and hurricane damage. Reach him by email.
